query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "learning from the self-future: on-policy self-distillation for dllms" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it proposes and evaluates the exact same mechanism (On-Policy Self-Distillation) and methodology that the user's question references, serving as the foundational work for the "self-future" concept in LLMs even though the user's specific focus on "linguistics" is a downstream application of this core algorithm.
